title: Raddia malmeana
taxonomy: Raddia malmeana is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Raddia. The genus Raddia is part of the tribe Bambuseae, which is a group of woody grasses. This classification places Raddia malmeana within the larger group of bamboo-like plants. As a member of the Poaceae family, Raddia malmeana is closely related to other grass species.
